case_title: ARMANDO HERRERA VS. LUIS ALFREDO PICASSO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA, ARMANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PICASSO, LUIS ALFREDO AN INDIVIDUAL $5,057.56 PRINCIPAL, $44.54 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,282.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MO TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCO, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU HEARING SET FOR DEC-12-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-12-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU AS TO DEFENDANT PICASSO, LUIS ALFREDO AN INDIVIDUAL

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF CREDITOR TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Mo To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Disco
Off Calendar Dec-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditor Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
